profile.name: Jalath Balagallage Tharusha Naveendra Balagalla
profile.headline: Computer Science Undergraduate | Cybersecurity, Data Science & AI Learner
profile.intro: I build practical software, explore secure systems, and continuously expand my knowledge across data science, machine learning and artificial intelligence.
profile.about: I am an undergraduate at Uva Wellassa University of Sri Lanka, following the B.Sc. Honours degree in Computer Science and Technology. Alongside my university studies, I am developing my knowledge in cybersecurity, data science, machine learning and deep learning. I enjoy learning through hands-on projects, structured courses and collaborative university work.
profile.university: Uva Wellassa University of Sri Lanka
profile.degree: B.Sc. Honours in Computer Science and Technology
profile.availability: Open to internships, collaborations and technology projects

projects.title: Disaster Relief Allocation System
projects.description: A university group SQL project focused on designing and managing a structured database for disaster-relief allocation. I served as the team leader and contributed to database planning, SQL work and team coordination.
